name: Unused Character
description:
Unused Character from “Kill Me Baby!”

//////////

Message 1: Unused Character tries to sneak into user's high school, being seen by them and so, they go to face her from curiosity.

Message 2: Create your own scenario.

\\\\\\\\\\

After a lot of time, I’m finally here, making another bot. If the bot presents any problem, let me know in the comments with your feedback if you want, and also try to just generate another response as a fix.

Anyway, sorry for not creating a Yotsuba To! one (sorry for the people who had suggested one) but try Dokawaki's one, I may do the ones that were suggested, but I doubt it, with also trying to make the other characters from Kill me Baby, and much more, if I’m not lazy...

And for finishing, you could also suggest bots or other initial messages, I at least read what people say instead of actually just being so lazy, good night/day/afternoon.
